hero.heading: Skip the Waiting Room
hero.desc: MedFlow AI connects patients, doctors & admins in real time — with autonomous AI agents, smart queue prediction, and commute-aware no-show prevention.

features.title: Predict. Prepare.
features.desc: 3 custom AI engines, 2 background daemons, and a fully deployed production system — not a Figma mockup.

how.title: From Booking to Consultation
how.desc: MedFlow AI handles every step of the patient journey — with zero manual intervention from the clinic side.
how.step1_desc: Patient uses AI symptom triage to find the right specialist, then books a slot online in under 60 seconds.
how.step2_desc: Pay consultation fee via Razorpay — HMAC-SHA256 verified on server side. Demo bypass available for presentations.
how.step3_desc: Live AI wait-time prediction updates every 20 seconds. Commute-aware engine monitors your ETA and triggers WhatsApp reminders 30 minutes before your slot.
how.step4_desc: Arrive at clinic and scan your digital QR token. Admin webcam scanner instantly checks you in and alerts the doctor.
how.daemons_title: Two Background AI Daemons Powering the Whole System
how.daemons_desc: A No-Show Detection Daemon runs every 25 seconds to auto-flag absent patients. A 30-Minute Reminder Daemon sends WhatsApp alerts before every appointment — all autonomously.

about.title: Pioneering the Next Generation of
about.desc: MedFlow AI was founded to bridge the gap between patient care and clinical operational efficiency. By leveraging traffic-aware commute tracking and smart queue scheduling, we eliminate waiting room bottlenecks to provide a stress-free experience for patients and save clinics millions of rupees in lost consulting hours.

contact.title: Connect With
contact.desc: Have questions about integrating MedFlow AI with your existing EHR system? Reach out and our engineering support team will assist you.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject

login.title: Sign In to MedFlow OS
login.sub: Welcome back! Connect to your specialized clinic agent.

patient.title: AI Patient Health Workspace
patient.sub: Manage consultation bookings, track travel ETAs, check drug interactions, and review prescriptions.
patient.etaDesc: AI calculates your commute delays, no-show risks, and exact queue wait times.
patient.triageDesc: Describe symptoms or upload observations to analyze severity and select medical specialties.
patient.symptomPlaceholder: e.g. Sharp chest pain on exertion, skin rash spreading...
patient.diagnoseWarning: ⚠️ This is an AI-generated assessment summary and not a professional medical diagnosis.
patient.vaultDesc: Upload physical scripts. AI translates handwriting into generic dosage checkers.
patient.uploadPlaceholder: Drag and drop prescription image or click to upload
patient.interactionWarning: ⚠️ Consult your physician before changing drug schedules.
patient.emptyTimeline: No consultations recorded in health history.

doctor.title: Clinical Doctor Panel
doctor.sub: Manage queue check-ins, prepare patient summaries, and finalize SOAP prescriptions.
doctor.emptySessionDesc: Use the buttons to call the next checked-in patient from the wait queue line.

pharmacist.title: Dispensary Hub & Pharmacy Panel
pharmacist.sub: Validate script OCR readings, generic alternatives, and drug interaction audits.
pharmacist.uploadDesc: Drag physical script image here. MedFlow OCR converts details to structured check logs.
pharmacist.interactionWarning: ⚡ WARNING: High risk interaction detected. Verify with physician.

owner.title: Clinic Owner Executive Panel
owner.sub: Real-time clinic analytics, doctor utilization charts, and RAG operations.
owner.historyHeader: Full Audit History Log (HIPAA Security Trail)
owner.emptyAudits: No actions recorded in audit trail.

admin.title: Hospital Administration Console
admin.sub: Live queue operations monitoring, directories, and analytical insights.
